headline: Ralph Lauren vs. PVH Corp: Which Fashion Powerhouse Holds the Edge?
summary: RL ramps up its premium push as PVH bets big on Calvin Klein and Tommy Hilfiger, intensifying competition in the global apparel market.

raw.headline: Ralph Lauren vs. PVH Corp: Which Fashion Powerhouse Holds the Edge?
raw.summary: RL ramps up its premium push as PVH bets big on Calvin Klein and Tommy Hilfiger, intensifying competition in the global apparel market.

headline: Shares of retail and apparel-related stocks are trading higher amid overall market strength after Iran opened the Strait of Hormuz for the remainder of the ceasefire following a 10-day armistice between Israel and Lebanon. This alleviates the ongoing supply disruption and lessens energy costs.
